prompt: Cinematic wide-angle editorial scene of a vast circular ancient library with a tiny illuminated central cluster of books surrounded by overwhelmingly empty, dark shelves, representing near-total loss. A lone figure sits reading at the center, emphasizing scale and rarity. The composition uses strong negative space and contrast between light and darkness to show that only a small fraction remains. No text, no labels, no symbols.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Most of the world’s languages are disappearing, leaving only a small fraction still actively spoken.
